ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "reqt_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., Functional, User) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the requirement (e.g., Must, Should, Could, Would) */,
  "dependency" TEXT /* ID of the requirement this one depends on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the requirement was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the requirement (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reqt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the credential belongs to */,
  "credential_type" TEXT /* Type of the credential (e.g., password, token) */,
  "credential_value" TEXT /* Value of the credential (e.g., hashed password, token value) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the credential expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_credentials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token used for authentication */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was last updated */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "reqt_id" TEXT /* ID of the requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the requirement (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the current status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_status_reqt_id FOREIGN KEY ("reqt_id") REFERENCES requirements ("reqt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "reqt_id" TEXT /* ID of the requirement */,
  "dependent_reqt_id" TEXT /* ID of the requirement this one depends on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., must be completed before, must be completed after) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_dependencies_reqt_id FOREIGN KEY ("reqt_id") REFERENCES requirements ("reqt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_dependencies_dependent_reqt_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_reqt_id") REFERENCES requirements ("reqt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_data" TEXT /* Additional data about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the password reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token used to reset the password */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was created */,
  "reset_status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the question belongs to */,
  "question" TEXT /* Security question asked to the user */,
  "answer_hash" TEXT /* Hashed answer to the security question */,
  "answer_salt" TEXT /* Salt used to hash the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "external_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "system_url" TEXT /* URL of the external system */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* Client ID for authentication */,
  "client_secret" TEXT /* Client secret for authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sso_configurations" (
  "sso_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSO configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "external_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external system */,
  "configured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the SSO was configured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sso_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sso_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sso_configurations_external_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_system_id") REFERENCES external_systems ("external_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identity_providers" (
  "identity_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identity provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the identity provider */,
  "provider_url" TEXT /* URL of the identity provider */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* Client ID for authentication */,
  "client_secret" TEXT /* Client secret for authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identity_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identity_provider_configurations" (
  "identity_provider_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identity provider configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "identity_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the identity provider */,
  "configured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the identity provider was configured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identity_provider_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identity_provider_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identity_provider_configurations_identity_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("identity_provider_id") REFERENCES identity_providers ("identity_provider_id")
)
